task_completion.description: Locate the December 2010 trip in the dive list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dive list shows a trip with a date in December 2010 (e.g., 2010-12) visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select the December 2010 trip to view its details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The December 2010 trip is highlighted or selected in the list, and its current details (initially 'Sund Rock, WA') appear in the editing panel.

task_completion.description: Change the trip location to 'Hood Canal Winter Retreat'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Location' text field in the trip details panel contains the exact text 'Hood Canal Winter Retreat'.

task_completion.description: Add the note 'Instructor training weekend' to the trip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Notes' text area in the trip details panel contains the exact text 'Instructor training weekend'.
The agent clicks a 'Save' icon, selects 'File -> Save' from the menu, or the application window title indicates no unsaved changes (e.g., an asterisk disappears) after the edits are made.

integrity.description: The agent must use the dive log GUI application (Subsurface) to make edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a graphical dive log application, not a text editor (like gedit, vim, or nano) opening the raw .ssrf XML file.

integrity.description: The agent must not use terminal commands to modify the file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'sed', 'awk', or python scripts being used to alter the .ssrf file.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the application's input fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the cursor in the text fields and the text being typed or pasted into the GUI, rather than the final state magically appearing without intermediate GUI steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target trip to edit is from December 2010 (date prefix '2010-12'). The expected location is exactly 'Hood Canal Winter Retreat'. The expected notes are exactly 'Instructor training weekend'.
